TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Fata’_an, title = Fata’_an, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Fata’_an} }

S.FORM: alang Fata' an ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Kongbu go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 1,988 buwan, 5,474 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 54% kyan ku 2,968 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 46% kyan ku 2,506 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 50%, Tayan 1%, Truku 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Fata' an hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Fata' an hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Fata' an hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Fata' an hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Fata' an hya' ga Laso'ay. tay 'llaw na Fata' an hya' ga Tafalong. qryum qani gu nyux wahan maki' na kkmamay ru kk'ma. cyux qwis na gong qu qalang rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas. pqwasan biru seneng maki 1 pqwasan biru seneng. pqwsan biru krahu maki 1 pqwsan biru krahu. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh spyangan na pinbahu singut

alang Fata' an ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Kongbu go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 1,988 buwan, 5,474 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 54% kyan ku 2,968 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 46% kyan ku 2,506 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 50%, Tayan 1%, Truku 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Fata' an hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Fata' an hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Fata' an hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Fata' an hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Fata' an hya' ga Laso'ay. tay 'llaw na Fata' an hya' ga Tafalong. qryum qani gu nyux wahan maki' na kkmamay ru kk'ma. cyux qwis na gong qu qalang rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas. pqwasan biru seneng maki 1 pqwasan biru seneng. pqwsan biru krahu maki 1 pqwsan biru krahu. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh spyangan na pinbahu singut
S.PHON: alaŋ *ataʔ an ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu koŋβu ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *,*** βuwan, *,*** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *,*** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *,*** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, tajan *%, truku *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na *ataʔ an ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na *ataʔ an ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na *ataʔ an ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na *ataʔ an ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na *ataʔ an ħjaʔ ɣa las~ɕoʔaj. taj ʔllaw na *ataʔ an ħjaʔ ɣa ta*aloŋ. qrjum qani ɣu njux waħan makiʔ na kkmamaj ru kkʔma. ʦ~ʨjux qwis~ɕ na ɣoŋ qu qalaŋ rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ. pqwas~ɕan βiru s~ɕeneŋ maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru s~ɕeneŋ. pqws~ɕan βiru kraħu maki * pqws~ɕan βiru kraħu. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu s~ɕiŋut
